conventions: Startup = first hitbox start_tick (state-local tick when hitbox activates). IASA = resolved iasa_at (when iasa_at is -1 in source it resolves to anim_length-1 at init). Active = active_ticks. Damage uses '(combo)' for damage_in_combo and 'min' for minimum_damage. Hit heights: High = overhead, Low = must block low, default Mid. 60 ticks per second. Wizard base stats: HP 1500, gravity 0.43, max ground speed 9, max air speed 8, max fall speed 6.5, 2 air options, dash speed 8 (slow), 9 super bars of 125 meter each, 1 burst (1500 burst meter).

moves.Notes: Fast grounded jab, anim 12. Hitstun 17, +1 on block, knockback 5 fwd/up. Slight forward step on enter. Orb trigger: OrbDart @12. Hitting 5x TomeSlap in one combo is an achievement, not a strategy.

Grounded slide kick, anim 30. Hits LOW. Big forward lunge (9.0 force @ tick 3), low-profile hurtbox (height 12) from tick 7. Hitstun 25, +1 on block, knockback 7 toward Wizard (dir -0.5,-0.25) - pulls them in. Orb trigger: Lightning @15.

Usable grounded or airborne. Data: x slider places the strike 30-120px in front (hitbox position set at tick 5). Hitstun 25, +1 on block, knockback 12 (launches), launch_reversible, block pushback pulls Wizard in (pushback_x -1). Orb trigger: OrbDart @16.

Dive kick, hits HIGH (overhead). Forced downward (dir_y 1.0, speed 9 @ tick 7). Sweet (below, priority 1): hitstun 17, +2, knockback 7.2 spiking down, air-ground bounces grounded foes; sour (body, above): d40 hitstun 14. Land-cancels. No collision with opponent ticks 2-13. Orb trigger: Lightning @15.

Aerial forward icicle, anim 19, hits HIGH. Two alternate hitboxes (far x35y-34 19x11, near x18y-17 12x10), both d70 start 5. Hitstun 23, +1, knockback 7.5 downward. Forward push (4.0 @ tick 5). Land-cancels. Orb trigger: Sword @10.

NOT directly selectable: auto-entered from grounded Icicle (IceSpikeGround) when aimed with y != 0. Anim 24, rises up-forward (force 1.5,-4.0 @ tick 3). d90 hitstun 14, +1, not hit-cancellable (cancellable=false on hitboxes), iasa_on_hit 11, min land cancel tick 7. Orb trigger: Sword @10.

Grounded icicle stab, anim 26, hits LOW. d90 hitstun 23, hitlag 11, knockback 6 up-forward, strong pushback on block (pushback_x 3, block pushback x0.5). Forward step on enter. Data: direction - choosing y != 0 switches to IceSpikeAir2 instead. Orb trigger: Sword @10.

Aerial explosion in front, hits HIGH, GUARD BREAK (true guard_break flag - beats block). Only 1 active tick. d100 hitstun 23, +3, knockback 8 up-forward, wall-slams. Self kickback (-3,-2) at tick 8. Min land cancel tick 8. Orb trigger: OrbDart @25.

Big conjured sword lunge (force 8.0 @ tick 8), anim 22, usable grounded or air. d120 hitstun 20 (25 if it armored through a hit), +3, knockback 16, wall-slams. PROJECTILE INVULN ticks 3-14, HYPER ARMOR ticks 6-14 (lost if hit before tick 6). Extended sword hurtboxes ticks 10-12. Cannot hit-cancel into Vile Clutch. Orb trigger: Sword @18.

Two lightning bolts on EACH side (hits both left and right): close bolts x +/-36 d60 GUARD BREAK + block_punishable, knockback 18 downward, not hit-cancellable; far bolts x +/-87 d70 @19. +2 on block. Grounded only. Orb trigger: Lightning @30.

ANTI-AIR ONLY: every hitbox has hits_vs_grounded=false, whiffs entirely on grounded opponents. Diagonal up-forward magma spray, anim 16. Close d100 (priority), three far d60 hitboxes along the arc. +1 on block. Orb trigger: OrbDart @25.

moves.Resource: Cooldown: one wave at a time + 30 ticks after it ends
moves.Notes: Ground-crawling flame wave projectile (hitstun 14/hit, loops 1 active/4 inactive). Usable grounded or air, anim 17. is_usable requires can_flame_wave && cooldown 0; cooldown starts when the wave despawns.
Aimable dart projectile (data x/y direction), hitstun 15. Anim 16, force-feintable, not self-interruptable. Orb trigger: OrbDart @10.

Rocket dash in aimed direction (speed 15, 1.75x horizontal during spark speed; momentum reset first). Ram hitbox placed along travel dir: knockback 18.5, knockdown, +2; body hitbox d85 active 15 ticks, +2 (script sets plus_frames 2 at frame 0, overriding scene's 1; +3 with spark speed). Land-cancels from tick 6 (landing recovery 6); landing after tick 7 = 4f lag, 12f if drifting backward. +20 penalty if used backward in neutral. Type Special despite super-ish feel.

No hitbox: 250x250 windbox shoves opponent and movable projectiles in aimed 8-way direction (fighters only pushed when not in hitlag; grounded foes only pushed horizontally). Push strength scales x0.85 per Gust already used this combo. Slight self-pushback opposite to aim (vertical only if airborne/hovering). Force-feintable. No orb trigger.

Grounded anti-air tornado. Windboxes (100x100, or 165x150 with initiative) suck in airborne objects for the throwbox's 23 active ticks; throwbox is ANTI-AIR ONLY (hits_vs_grounded=false) and on catch goes to ZephyrThrow: carried up and slammed at throw tick 32 for 140 (throw, untechable into hitbox). Backup d20 hitbox: knockdown, sdi x0.25, knocks away. NOT burst-cancellable. Initiative effect move. ZephyrThrow orb trigger: Sword @50.

moves.Startup: - (projectile spawns tick 8; its hits at +10 and +19)
moves.Resource: One at a time (until hand despawns)
moves.Notes: Shadow hand erupts from the ground at data.x * 500px (max) in front of Wizard (screen-anchored, not relative). Low recovery (IASA 13 of anim 18). Can chain from itself (interrupt_from includes VileClutch). Orb trigger: OrbDart @60.

FLIP hitboxes (hitbox_type=1): on hit, reverses the opponent's facing AND x-velocity; on block it still flips their facing. Doesn't increment combo or scale, can't clash, loses to grab (beats_grab=false), zero block pushback, +1. On hit shoves them away (5.0) and becomes IASA 12; on whiff only interruptible at anim end (iasa forced to -1 at tick 0).

Swept 18x18 hitbox beam from Wizard toward aimed point, range 300/400/500 by charge. Plus frames +1/+3/+4. Hitstun 18, knocks grounded into air. Data: Direction + Charge count (UI caps at current charges; charge picker hidden below 2). Not feintable, not reversible. Charges (max 3) gained by: parrying, opening a combo with a non-Geyser/non-Burst melee hit. Orb trigger: OrbDart @30. Air-usable; landing during ticks <6 or >10 cancels to Landing.

Super (freeze 5). Rips a boulder from the ground: small LOW hitbox d80 hits OTG, pops up (knockdown). Boulder spawns tick 6 at (32,-12) and floats until Launched. 15% chance of a silly item (pebble/bomb/tire/fruit); ghost sim shows a generic boulder to hide RNG. Boulder DROPS (falling hit, d105) if Wizard gets hit. Only one boulder at a time.

moves.Startup: - (boulder hitbox starts 4 ticks into its flight)
moves.Notes: Flings the held boulder in aimed direction (data x/y) at tick 0. Listed under Super category but costs nothing. Boulder hitstun 18.
Re-aims a boulder that is ALREADY flying (requires boulder in Launch state). Super freeze 5, scales combo meter.

Plants a sticky armed bomb at (40,-16). Detonate via the 'detonate' turn extra when Wizard is within 90px: each bomb explodes, Wizard takes 31 but gains SPARK SPEED for 70 ticks (max ground speed 20, air 25, dash speed 12, jump x1.5, Missile Form x1.75 horizontal). Getting parried during spark speed adds +6 hitlag to Wizard.

moves.Resource: Requires 3 super bars; consumes 0 upfront; drains 2 meter/tick (+1 per 70 ticks) while out; all meter gain halved
moves.Notes: Install super (level 3 gate, supers_used=0). Spawns a floating orb at (-10,-56). Most Wizard normals auto-trigger an orb attack after a per-move delay (Dart/Sword/Lightning per move Notes). Orb dies when meter hits 0. Turn extras while orb is out: 8-way push (impulse 8.5) and Lock/Unlock (freeze orb in place). Fuels Orb Portal and Orb Tether.

moves.Resource: 1 super bar (consumed at tick 1); requires orb within 640 horizontal / 200 above
moves.Notes: Teleports Wizard to the orb and CONSUMES the orb (disabled). Invulnerable ticks 1-2, momentum reset. Listed super_level=0 so it bypasses the bar-count gate but still spends 1 bar. Does not scale combo meter. Not feintable.

moves.Resource: 1 air option if airborne; requires orb
moves.Notes: Pulls Wizard toward the orb for up to 90 ticks (speed 1.5 with 0.95^t falloff). Tether ends on landing or getting hit. Sets airborne at start; lands to Landing after tick 8. Anim 40 but IASA 10.

Universal block/parry. Data: Block Height (high/low) + Melee Parry Timing count (tick you predict the hit lands = perfect parry). Airborne always uses low anim. Disables hover/fast-fall toggles while blocking.
Same as Block but only usable immediately after a whiffed (non-parrying) block; the normal Block is locked out in that situation (is_usable swap). Punishable re-block.
Block that shoves attackers away on contact (150x150 Detect box). Costs 1 bar (super_level_=1, freeze 2). Wizard uses shield sprites for it (use_guard_sprites).
Roll with throw + projectile invulnerability (NOT strike invulnerable). Backward roll is slower-moving (x0.3 force). Cancels Wizard's hover/fast-fall.
Grounded idle for 10 ticks; interruptible on opponent's turn.
Aerial idle/drift; interruptible on opponent's turn.

moves.IASA: 10 static; dynamic 9-14 neutral / 7-14 in combo by Distance data
moves.Notes: Wizard dash_speed 8 (base characters use 12 - Wizard's dash is slow; spark speed raises it to 12). Data: Distance slider + AutoCorrect. beats_backdash: punishes backdashes.
dash_speed 7, stops at tick 9 (wizard stop_frame override). Throw-invulnerable at start. backdash_iasa: IASA denied if opponent used a beats_backdash move.

moves.IASA: - (endless hold; releases into ChargeDashForward, IASA 10, dash_speed 8)
moves.Notes: Hold-style charge dash: small backward shuffle while held, releases into a 30-tick forward dash. beats_backdash, allow_framecheat.

moves.IASA: interrupt frames 7 (short hop) / 18 / 60; short-hop IASA 9 (7 in combo), full hop 14
moves.Notes: Wizard jump speed 8, y_modifier 1.2 (global x0.85). Data: x/y direction (or homing default). Throw-invulnerable on rise unless squat-jumping. 1.5x horizontal during spark speed.
speed 16, y_modifier 1.1; can only interrupt into Aerial; doesn't auto-continue on hold.
Wizard speed 8, y_modifier 1.1. 1.5x horizontal during spark speed.

Grounded grab, whiffs on airborne (hits_vs_aerial=false). Data: Direction (fwd/back/down picks throw) + Dash (adds 4-tick dash lag w/ momentum) + Jump (becomes rising JumpGrab). Techable ticks 1-9. No meter on whiff.
Aerial grab, whiffs on grounded (hits_vs_grounded=false). Same data options as Throw.
Wizard override: anim 24, releases at tick 8, knockback 20 nearly flat (dir_y -0.10), hitstun 30. Only appears while holding the opponent (GroundedThrow category).
Same as Forward Throw but reversed. Wizard anim 24, release 8, knockback 20.
Wizard anim 28, knockback 20. AerialThrow category (only while air-holding).
Wizard anim 28, knockback 20, reversed.
Wizard anim 24; spikes downward (dir 0.10, 1.0), knockback 10.

Only selectable while in hitstun (BusyHurt category). Fully invulnerable ticks 0-15, projectile-invulnerable throughout. Knockback 14 Burst-type hitbox resets the combo. Cancels Wizard's hover/fast-fall and drops detonation.
Neutral-only burst (unusable during your own combo). On hit, opponent becomes invulnerable; if used with initiative, refunds a large chunk of super meter. Invuln ticks 0-15.
Combo-only (reached as a hit-cancel). Keeps the combo going (OffensiveBurst hitbox, hitstun 24, kb 4). Invuln ticks 0-15.

moves.Resource: 12.5% burst meter (or a stocked burst as gate)
moves.Notes: Combo-escape read: usable from hitstun. Absorbs/counters the next high-hitting attack. Unusable if the hit that put you in stun was a counter-hit. Anim 60.
As Brace High but counters lows.
As Brace High but counters grabs.
From knockdown (OTG category). Invulnerable from tick 0; grants wakeup throw immunity on exit.
Knockdown tech roll with full invulnerability (tech=true) plus throw/projectile invuln. Direction data.
Roman-cancel: only after hitting the opponent or during a combo; instantly actionable. Super freeze 3, no super flash.

moves.Resource: 75% burst meter (or stocked burst as gate)
moves.Notes: Cancels a whiffed move; can only interrupt into attacks/specials/supers (not movement or parry). Unusable if you were just parried or blocked.

moves.Resource: Grants +1 FULL super bar at tick 44
moves.Notes: 45-tick taunt; if it reaches tick 44 you gain a full bar of meter. Wizard variant slides with low friction (0.025) instead of stopping.

quirks: No stances (single 'Normal' stance). Core gimmicks: (1) HOVER/FAST-FALL replaces air dash - per-turn extras toggle hovering (y-velocity damped x0.70 falling / x0.94 rising) or fast-fall (locks fall speed to 7). Hover gauge: max 1200, starts at 900; drains 25/tick hovering, 20/tick fast-falling; regens 12/tick grounded (4 when below the 250 usability floor), -1/tick airborne; both toggles need gauge > 250. AirDash is disabled for Wizard (interrupt_from cleared in Wizard.tscn) and SuperFall is unselectable - hover IS the air mobility. Hover breaks on: getting hit, blocking a melee hit, rolling, hurt states. (2) ORB install: needs 3 bars banked but spends none - drains 2 meter/tick escalating +1 per 70 ticks, and halves ALL meter gain while active; tagged moves auto-fire orb attacks after a delay (OrbDart d60, Sword d50+60+60, Lightning d100/strike - see per-move Notes); orb is pushable (8-way extra, impulse 8.5) and lockable (extra checkbox -> LockOrb/UnlockOrb internal states); Orb Portal teleports to it (1 bar, eats the orb), Orb Tether pulls Wizard toward it. (3) GEYSER CHARGES (max 3 droplets): gained on parry and on opening a combo with a melee hit (not Geyser/Burst); spent 1-3 on Geyser for 130/150/170 damage at 300/400/500 range. (4) TELEKINESIS boulder: held until Launch (free) flings it; Redirect (1 bar) re-aims mid-flight; boulder drops if Wizard is hit; 15% silly-item RNG (pebble 46 / bomb / tire / fruit), hidden from ghost previews. (5) SPARK BOMB kamikaze: detonate extra blows bombs within 90px - 140 to them, 31 to yourself per bomb, plus 70 ticks of spark speed (ground 20 / air 25 / dash 12 / jump x1.5 / Missile Form x1.75). (6) FLAME WAVE one-at-a-time with 30-tick cooldown after the wave dies; VILE CLUTCH one-at-a-time, no cooldown. (7) CONFUSING TOUCH flips opponent facing+velocity even on block. (8) Anti-air-only attacks: Bolt of Magma (all hitboxes) and Zephyr's grab box whiff on grounded targets. (9) Slow dash (8 vs standard 12) and floaty stats (gravity 0.43, fall 6.5). (10) Meter gain is halved while orb is out, and Wizard damages own team (spark bombs). Projectile ownership: orb/boulder/bombs/waves all die or drop based on Wizard's state - getting hit drops the boulder; meter hitting 0 kills the orb.

unverified.reason: Included for completeness but it has no menu button (empty interrupt_from): it is auto-entered from IceSpikeGround when aim data y != 0. Treat as a variant of grounded Icicle.

Passes the show_in_menu/selectable/interrupt_from test so a second 'Block' button exists, but is_usable gates it to the turn immediately after a whiffed block (and disables normal Block there). Effectively contextual.
start_tick is 11/11/10 by charge, but Geyser.gd holds current_tick at 0 for STARTUP_LAG=4 extra ticks (charge 3 then skips tick 1->2). Effective visual startup ~15/15/13 - not frame-tested in game.

Far hitbox (x=59) has no start_tick override in Wizard.tscn so it inherits default 0 (active immediately, 4 ticks); near hitbox starts at 3. Verified in the scene file but suspicious as-authored; possibly intended reversed.

unverified.move: Roll / TechRoll / DashForward / DashBackward / Jump family
unverified.reason: IASA is set dynamically by script (RollStartup.gd forces 20/19; Dash.gd scales 7-14 with Distance data; Jump.gd uses interrupt_frames plus short/full-hop IASA constants). Static .tscn values alone are misleading; dynamic values reported.

Liftoff.tscn exports landing_recovery=4 but Liftoff.gd _frame_0 overwrites it to 6, and a grounded finish after tick 7 queues Landing with 4 (or 12 if drifting backward). Script wins at runtime; exact interplay untested.

unverified.move: Sandstorm, ConfusingTouch2, OrbPush, LockOrb, UnlockOrb, DrawMoisture, SuperFallStartup, AirDash, DashStartup, DashBackwardHold, JumpGrab
unverified.reason: Present in the scene but NOT in Wizard's action menu in this build: empty interrupt_from_string (Sandstorm, ConfusingTouch2, OrbPush, ZephyrThrow, IceSpikeAir2, DashStartup, DashBackwardHold) or selectable=false (LockOrb, UnlockOrb, DrawMoisture, SuperFallStartup, JumpGrab, ParryAuto/Low/Air, SuperFall). DrawMoisture (geyser-charge channel, +1 charge at its tick 12) appears to be cut content; orb push/lock are exposed as turn EXTRAS instead of buttons. Wizard's AirDash is explicitly disabled via empty interrupt_from in Wizard.tscn.
Buttons exist only while the corresponding GroundedThrow/AerialThrow category is reachable (i.e., during Hold/AirHold after a successful grab). Included since show_in_menu is true.

Meter cost (12.5% burst meter) and gating verified from CounterAttack.gd; the precise counter resolution (what 'absorbing' the matching height does next) lives in hurt-state plumbing and was not fully traced.

Boulder d105, big boulder d120, pebble d46 verified; TelekinesisBomb shows damage=0 on its Launch hitbox (real damage presumably in TelekinesisBombExplosion scene, not extracted); tire/fruit damages not extracted.
On initiative hit it calls gain_super_meter((MAX_SUPER_METER*5)/3) ~ 208 meter (1.67 bars). Exact stale/scaling interaction unverified.
